hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional contractor couple working on a residential home exterior in a Buford-area suburban neighborhood — one on a ladder at the gutter line, one prepping paint or roofing materials below, both in clean branded uniforms, photorealistic, no text or logos, no signage, warm natural daylight.
hero.caption_context: Couple-run crew is the trust story. Hero should if possible show Jose + Yenire (or a 2-person crew stand-in) working together on a real exterior job — not solo contractor. Exterior work (gutter/paint/roof) differentiates from interior-remodel verticals.

gallery.context: Gutter cleaning or install — ladder, hose, debris removal. Caption 'Gutters — cleaning, install, repair'.
Roofing repair or shingle replacement. Caption 'Roofing — repair, replacement, full-roof'.
Exterior paint in progress or finished. Caption 'Exterior paint — full-home, trim, touch-up'.
Interior paint — room in progress or finished. Caption 'Interior paint — rooms, trim, ceilings'.
Soffit/fascia repair or pressure wash (common exterior add-on). Caption 'Exterior refresh — soffit, fascia, pressure wash'.
Owners Jose + Yenire together OR a fully-refreshed home exterior (gutter + paint + roof all done). Caption names owners if surfaced — reinforces couple-run brand.

sections.context: Buford / Sugar Hill / Suwanee residential streetscape; Unsplash OK if no real photos

notes: Exterior home-improvement vertical with multi-trade scope. Hero priority: show the couple-run crew signal if photos support it. Gutter + roof + paint each get a dedicated slot because rebuild-queue undersold the scope. North Gwinnett corridor has 2000s-2010s vintage homes due for full exterior refresh — the site should invite the gutter+roof+paint bundle call, not just single-service.
